prompt: i have a ViT model (google/vit-base-patch16-224) and im trying to decide whether to ship the NPU version or just use CPU. running on a snapdragon x elite. whats the cleanest way to get apples-to-apples latency numbers from both?

assertions.text: Recommends `winml inspect` before any build/benchmark work.
Identifies QNN as the EP for Snapdragon X Elite NPU.
Recommends building the model once and running `winml perf` twice (NPU + CPU).
Specifies that the CPU run should use the optimized (pre-compile) artifact, NOT the QNN-compiled artifact.
Warns that EP-compiled artifacts are EP-locked.
Directs to --help or uses only common patterns.
